comment: Each slot describes a MOOD — not a genre. Kimi decides the sound each day based on weather, recently-played history, and trending Netease playlists sampled from seed_categories. Set exploration=high for more discovery, low for safer picks. Delete seed_categories to skip netease sampling for that slot.

slots.name: 房间先醒
slots.mood: the unsettled-but-alive feeling of just opening your eyes — let the sound be tender or a little strange, warm or crisp, but never demanding. Language and genre are open; what matters is the slow-waking pace.

slots.name: 深度工作
slots.mood: sustained focus — cinematic without being distracting, emotional without pulling attention. Room for instrumental, ambient, modern classical, minimal electronic, post-rock. Vocals welcome only if they blur into texture.

slots.name: 午休韩语
slots.mood: a loose, unhurried lunch hour — contemporary Korean indie / K-R&B / J-pop / city pop vibes. Warm, low-stakes, slightly nostalgic.

slots.name: 下午漂流
slots.mood: the afternoon lull — don't wake me up, don't put me to sleep. Can be lo-fi, sun-kissed electronic, mellow indie, old soul, bossa, anything that feels like light through a window.

slots.name: 傍晚散步
slots.mood: coming back to yourself at the end of a day — songs that carry feeling without demanding it. Everything from Cantopop to post-rock to modern jazz is welcome.

slots.name: 夜晚收尾
slots.mood: late-night introspection — intimate, warm, close-miked. Not sleep music; music to think against. Piano, quiet jazz, hushed ballads, ambient with melody.
